title: Autopilot Monitor Gather Rule
description: Defines what data the agent should collect from a Windows device during Autopilot enrollment.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor IntelliSense.

title.description: Human-readable rule title (e.g., "Collect WinHTTP Proxy Settings").

description.description: Detailed description of what this rule collects and why.

enabled.description: Whether this rule is enabled. Set to false to add a rule without activating it immediately.

isCommunity.description: Whether this is a community-contributed rule. Community rules are stored in the global partition alongside built-in rules.

target.description: Target for collection. Registry path, event log name, WMI query, file path, command string, or log file path depending on collectorType.

parameters.description: Additional parameters for the collector (all values are strings).

intervalSeconds.description: Interval in seconds (only used when trigger = "interval").

triggerPhase.description: Phase to trigger on (only used when trigger = "phase_change").

triggerEventType.description: Event type to trigger on (only used when trigger = "on_event").

activePhases.description: Run the rule only while the current enrollment phase is one of these phases (EnrollmentPhase enum names). Empty/absent = unrestricted. Mutually exclusive with activeFromPhase.

activeFromPhase.description: Activate the rule once the enrollment phase first reaches this phase, then keep it active for the rest of the session (sticky latch). Absent = unrestricted. Mutually exclusive with activePhases.

emitMode.description: Emit behavior: "always" (default — emit on every collection) or "on_change" (poll on the trigger cadence but emit only when the collected result changes; the first in-scope result always emits).
